subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is Thy servant upon whose heart's meadows the fragrant breezes of Thy holy love have wafted, and in the atmosphere of whose heart hath shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذا عبدک الذی هبت علی ریاض قلبه من روایح قدس محبتک و سطعت فی فضاء فواده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
